auditTrail.title: Audit trail
auditTrail.summary: {total, plural, =0 {No entries} one {# entry} other {# entries}} · page {page} of {totalPages}
auditTrail.empty: No audit entries match these filters.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.subtitle: Invite users to your workspace and manage pending invites.

send.title: Send invitation
send.description: Invited users receive an email link valid for 7 days.

list.title: Pending invitations
list.description: All invitations that have not yet been accepted or revoked.

sent.title: Invitation sent
sent.description: An email has been sent to {email}. It expires {when}.

revoked.title: Invitation revoked
revoked.description: The invitation for {email} has been revoked.

roleChange.title: Change user role
roleChange.hint: Admins can manage users, invitations, and audit logs. Regular users only see their own account.

userDetail.loadError: We couldn't load this user. They may have been removed.

info.title: Account info
info.description: Read-only profile details from the user's record.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Admin-only changes to this user's account.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.description: Latest audit entries with this user as the actor.

empty.title: No users match this search
empty.description: Try a different name or email.
